items.title: Progressive firebrand concedes in cliffhanger North Carolina congressional primary battle with incumbent Dem
items.description: Progressive challenger Nida Allam conceded the narrow North Carolina congressional Democratic primary to Rep. Valerie Foushee by 1%.

items.title: Pentagon policy chief grilled as Dem claims Trump broke promise about going to war with Iran
